changes.name: Postman（ブログ）
changes.diff_text:
+How DevRel saves thousands of tokens per Claude Code run
+Quinton Wall
+A benchmark report: we audited 19 production Claude Code skills, cut invocation costs 23% (13,300 tokens per run), and found none had tool scoping. Here’s the data — and what it’s worth in dollars.
+Read more →
-AI is ready. Your APIs probably aren’t.
-Matt Gray
-Postman achieved the AWS AI Competency in Agentic AI Tools, and that says as much about your APIs as it does about…
-Read more →
